sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VRTL Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:VRTL
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information on the GraniteShares 2x Long VRT Daily ETF (VRTL), including its price, key stats, and operational details. VRTL is a short-term tactical tool designed to deliver 2x the daily price return of Vertiv Holdings Co. (VRT) stock, requiring frequent rebalancing for holders to achieve its target leverage. The fund invests mainly in cash and uses options for its leveraged strategy, coming with an expense ratio of 1.50%.

feed.title: LX, KEPCO Partner to Improve Power Facility Location Accuracy
feed.summary: Korea Land and Geospatial Informatix Corp. (LX) and Korea Electric Power Corp. (KEPCO) have signed a business agreement to improve the location accuracy of power facilities, particularly utility poles. This collaboration will leverage LX's cadastral surveying and geospatial information technologies to precisely map KEPCO's facilities and integrate this data with cadastral maps. The initiative aims to enhance power facility management efficiency, accelerate digital transformation, and improve public convenience.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank retains a buy rating on International Seaways, Inc. (INSW)
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has reiterated its buy rating on International Seaways, Inc. (INSW). This indicates a continued positive outlook from the bank regarding the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation Showcases Autonomous Industrial Operations at Hannover Messe 2026
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation will showcase its advancements in autonomous industrial operations at Hannover Messe 2026, focusing on how manufacturers can transition from automation to autonomy using industrial-grade AI and secure architectures. The company plans to demonstrate real-world applications of AI, digital twins, and secure OT solutions to enhance productivity and quality. Visitors can explore these technologies at Rockwell's booth in the "AI in Manufacturing" Hall and through collaborations with partners like AWS and Microsoft.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT is Harbor Investment Advisory LLC's 3rd Largest Position
feed.summary: Harbor Investment Advisory LLC has increased its stake in Microsoft (MSFT) by 3.3% in the fourth quarter, making it their third-largest holding. Microsoft reported strong Q4 earnings and revenue, exceeding estimates, and holds a significant market capitalization. However, market sentiment is mixed with positive catalysts like an AI partnership with Nvidia and a Buy reinitiation from BofA, offset by concerns including reports of a challenging quarter and analyst price target reductions.

feed.title: Raymond James downgrades Fiserv stock rating on growth concerns
feed.summary: Raymond James downgraded Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) to Market Perform from Outperform, citing concerns over the company's valuation and decelerating organic growth. Analyst Madison Suhr highlighted insufficient confidence in the temporary nature of near-term headwinds in Financial Services and Clover, alongside a heightened competitive landscape. The stock has fallen 74% in the past year, though InvestingPro views it as undervalued.

feed.title: Carlyle and KKR to build two $2B data centers for U.S. Army, FT reports (KKR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Carlyle and KKR are reported by the Financial Times to be building two data centers for the U.S. Army on military bases. Each data center will cost $2 billion, with the army providing the necessary land for the facilities. This initiative highlights a significant investment in military infrastructure by these private equity firms.

feed.title: Citizens cuts Kalvista Pharmaceuticals stock price target on steady launch
feed.summary: Citizens has lowered its price target for Kalvista Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ:KALV) to $28.00 from $29.00, while maintaining a Market Outperform rating, noting the stock's strong momentum and recent performance near its 52-week high. This adjustment follows the consistent launch and sales of Ekterly, which generated $49 million globally by year-end 2025, demonstrating continued market adoption despite newer prophylactic drugs. The firm projects 2026 revenue of $245 million, significantly above the consensus of $183 million, based on positive commercial trajectory and analyst revisions.

feed.title: Raymond James downgrades Global Payments stock rating on valuation concerns
feed.summary: Raymond James downgraded Global Payments (NYSE: GPN) from Outperform to Market Perform due to valuation concerns and a lack of immediate catalysts for improved investor perception. The firm sees better value in more defensive business models and notes that Global Payments' stock valuation is justified given its more modest organic revenue growth projections. Despite the downgrade, InvestingPro suggests the company may be undervalued, and it has maintained dividend payments for 26 consecutive years.

feed.title: F5 & Forcepoint join to secure enterprise AI systems
feed.summary: F5 and Forcepoint have announced a partnership to secure enterprise AI systems by integrating data security with runtime protection for AI applications. This collaboration aims to close security gaps that arise when organizations rapidly deploy AI tools, combining Forcepoint's data discovery and classification with F5's runtime controls for applications, APIs, and models. The initiative provides a unified approach for security teams to identify data vulnerabilities, manage risks, and ensure AI systems align with governance requirements throughout their lifecycle.

feed.title: How much did the house sell for? Washington County deed transfers for Jan. 18-24, 2026
feed.summary: This article lists the residential and non-residential property deed transfers in Washington County, Maryland, for the week of January 18-24, 2026. It details the buyers, sellers, addresses, and sale prices for numerous properties, including residential homes and larger non-residential land deals.

feed.title: NRG Energy Stock Heads For Best Week In A Month: CEO Flags Early Stages Of ‘Demand Supercycle’
feed.summary: NRG Energy's stock is experiencing its best week in a month following comments from CEO Larry Coben, who believes the industry is in the "early stages of a demand supercycle" driven by data centers, electrification, and manufacturing onshoring. Analysts from Morgan Stanley, Wolfe Research, and Goldman Sachs have expressed optimism, upgrading ratings and increasing price targets due to NRG's expanded generation capacity and strategic acquisitions. Despite a slight dip in retail sentiment, the company's strong fundamentals and projected growth are being highlighted.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock’s Wakefield workers walk out over wage dispute
feed.summary: Production workers at Smurfit Westrock's Wakefield, Massachusetts facility have initiated an unfair labor practice strike over contract disputes concerning wages, healthcare, and retirement contributions. This action follows the expiration of their previous agreement and amid the company's plans to close the Wakefield site, resulting in 91 job losses, and separate discontinuations at its Canadian facilities. Teamsters Local 3, representing the striking workers, has accused Smurfit Westrock of corporate bullying for prioritizing executive compensation over worker benefits.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Buys 22,365 Shares of NorthWestern Corporation $NWE
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased its holdings in NorthWestern Corporation by 7.5% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 22,365 shares to reach a total of 318,669 shares, valued at approximately $18.7 million. Several other institutional investors also significantly boosted their stakes, contributing to institutional ownership of NorthWestern now standing at 96.07%. Despite a "Hold" rating from analysts and an average target price below its current trading price, NorthWestern announced a quarterly dividend of $0.67, representing a 4.1% yield.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Sells 239,324 Shares of Atkore Inc. $ATKR
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in Atkore Inc. by 44.7% in the third quarter, selling 239,324 shares and now holding 295,838 shares valued at approximately $18.56 million. This move comes as other major institutional investors like Vanguard and Jefferies either increased their holdings or opened new positions in Atkore. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend, while analysts anticipate future EPS growth.

feed.title: Invesco Rochester Limited Term New York Municipal Fund Q4 2025 Commentary (undefined:LTNYX)
feed.summary: The Invesco Rochester Limited Term New York Municipal Fund (LTNYX) Class A shares outperformed its style-specific index in Q4 2025. This was driven by positive returns across investment grade, high yield, and taxable municipals, alongside a record year for new municipal issuance. The fund's overweighting in bonds with durations between seven and 15 years contributed to its strong relative performance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Purchases 11,405 Shares of AZZ Inc. $AZZ
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its stake in AZZ Inc. by 7.5%, acquiring an additional 11,405 shares, bringing its total holding to 163,954 shares valued at $17.892 million. This comes as AZZ Inc. reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a $100 million share buyback program and a quarterly dividend. Institutional investors collectively own approximately 90.93% of AZZ's stock, with several other large investors also adjusting their positions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Trims Stock Position in Prudential Public Limited Company $PUK
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reduced its stake in Prudential Public Limited Company (NYSE:PUK) by 24.8% in the third quarter, selling 204,431 shares and retaining 618,478 shares valued at approximately $17.31 million. Prudential Public declared a dividend of $0.3778 per share, representing a 262.0% yield, payable on May 13th to shareholders of record on March 27th. The stock holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, though individual ratings range from "Buy" to "Strong Sell."

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Makes New Investment in Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III $IPCX
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. recently acquired 1,659,759 shares of Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III (IPCX), marking a new investment worth approximately $16.75 million and representing about 4.82% ownership. Other institutional investors like Hudson Bay Capital Management, MMCAP, AQR, Picton Mahoney, and Wealthspring also increased or initiated positions in IPCX. Despite these investments, analyst sentiment for IPCX remains negative, with Weiss Ratings reiterating a "Sell" rating and a consensus "Sell" rating on MarketBeat.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Boosts Stake in Darling Ingredients Inc. $DAR
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly increased its stake in Darling Ingredients Inc. by 75.6% in the third quarter, now holding over 600,000 shares valued at approximately $18.56 million. This comes as CEO Randall C. Stuewe recently sold a portion of his shares, reducing his ownership by 1.76%. The company, DAR, has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $57.90, and institutional investors own a substantial 94.44% of its stock.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has $16.95 Million Stake in Buckle, Inc. (The) $BKE
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly increased its stake in Buckle, Inc. (NYSE:BKE) by 376.3% during the third quarter, now holding 288,920 shares valued at $16.95 million. This move comes as institutional investors collectively own 53.93% of the company's stock, while insiders have recently sold shares totaling approximately $3.99 million. Buckle reported strong Q1 earnings, beating estimates with $1.59 EPS and $399.1M in revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.35.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Sempra (SRE) Selling Majority Infrastructure Stake To KKR And Steady SoCalGas Dividends
feed.summary: Sempra is rebalancing its portfolio by selling a majority stake in its infrastructure business to KKR, moving towards a more utility-focused model. This divestment aims to strengthen its regulated utility earnings while its SoCalGas subsidiary continues to pay steady preferred dividends. Investors are weighing the benefits of reinvesting infrastructure proceeds into regulated utilities against the potential loss of diversification from LNG and midstream assets, with varying fair value estimates highlighting diverse opinions on the company's future.

feed.title: Assessing Edison International (EIX) Valuation After Recent Short Term Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) has seen recent share price declines but maintains strong longer-term returns, trading at $71.19. The company is considered 5.7% overvalued based on a narrative forecasting $67.37, driven by expected long-term load growth from electrification and significant investments in grid modernization. However, its current P/E ratio of 6.1x is significantly below the industry average, suggesting potential undervaluation compared to peers and raising questions about market sentiment.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Grows Stock Holdings in Quantum Computing Inc. $QUBT
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly increased its stake in Quantum Computing Inc. (QUBT) by 1,612% in Q3, now owning 933,925 shares valued at $17.19 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard, Alyeska, Anson, Ghisallo, and Polar also boosted their holdings in QUBT, signaling growing institutional interest despite recent insider selling by the CFO and COO. Quantum Computing reported an EPS of ($0.01) for the last quarter, beating analyst consensus, and has seen varied analyst ratings with a current average "Hold" and a consensus target price of $17.00.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Boosts Position in Rithm Capital Corp. $RITM
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its stake in Rithm Capital Corp. ($RITM) by 8.6% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 1,536,981 shares valued at approximately $17.5 million. The company's recent earnings beat analyst estimates, reporting $0.74 EPS against an expected $0.55, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.25, representing an attractive 10.9% yield. Analysts currently have an average "Moderate Buy" rating for Rithm Capital, with an average price target of $14.50.

feed.title: Prudential Financial stock faces pressure amid insurance sector volatility and recent analyst shifts
feed.summary: Prudential Financial stock is experiencing pressure due to insurance sector volatility, interest rate uncertainty, and recent institutional trading activity. Despite these challenges, Prudential's strong fundamentals in life insurance and asset management, particularly through its PGIM subsidiary, position it as a defensive play for US investors. The company's focus on dividend yield and capital returns, combined with its conservative investment approach, aims to provide stability amidst market fluctuations and an aging population landscape.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake stock rating upgraded to Buy by Rothschild Redburn on M&A
feed.summary: Rothschild Redburn has upgraded Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (NYSE: WAB) from Neutral to Buy, increasing its price target to $285 from $262 due to the company's strong M&A activity and recent contract wins. Despite a 27% increase in share price over the past six months, InvestingPro suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its Fair Value estimate. The analyst firm believes Wabtec's execution and earnings growth warrant a valuation premium, projecting a 16% potential upside from current levels.

feed.title: Tesla, Oracle make Fortune list of most innovative companies
feed.summary: Austin-based Tesla Inc. and Oracle Corp. have been named among Fortune's most innovative companies of 2026, ranking 17th and 10th respectively. Tesla was recognized for product innovation ahead of its anticipated Cybercab launch, while Oracle also received acclaim for its product innovation in cloud technology. Other Texas-based companies and Elon Musk's SpaceX also appeared on the list.

feed.title: Gartner Stock: Strong Cash Flow Poised for a Re-Rating?
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) stock is presented as a compelling investment opportunity, with strong cash flow and a significant valuation discount despite recent conservative guidance and macroeconomic uncertainties. The company exhibits robust fundamentals including an impressive cash flow yield of 10.9% and growth potential, supported by AI-powered tools and investment-grade financial strength. While risks like market downturns and stock volatility exist, Gartner's strong underlying financial health and attractive valuation metrics suggest potential for a re-rating.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Raises Holdings in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) by nearly 50% in Q4, now holding shares worth approximately $3.08 million. This comes as Qualcomm's board approved a $20 billion stock repurchase program and the company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $3.50 EPS and $12.25 billion in revenue, also declaring an $0.89 quarterly dividend. Despite some analyst price target reductions, the stock has an average "Hold" rating, and insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: Startup investment is critical for business
feed.summary: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan emphasizes that corporate venture investment is crucial for large organizations like Intel to stay competitive and avoid being left behind by rapid technological advancements in areas such as AI, quantum computing, and robotics. He sees corporate venture units as "eyes and ears," providing strategic awareness and speed necessary to navigate emerging bottlenecks in the semiconductor industry. Tan asserts that companies must engage closely with startups and venture capital to ensure continuous innovation and adapt to systemic changes, rather than relying solely on internal R&D.

feed.title: State Street Corporation $STT Shares Sold by Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) by 11.7% in the fourth quarter, selling over 133,000 shares. Despite this, State Street remains a significant holding for the fund, and other institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions in the company. State Street reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO Stock Position Lifted by Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. by 43.3% in the fourth quarter, making it their 10th largest holding. Other institutional investors also significantly increased their positions in CSCO, while corporate insiders sold some shares. The article also highlights recent positive news for Cisco, including strategic investments, technological collaborations, and strong analyst ratings, alongside some neutral and negative sentiments regarding valuation and margin pressures.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Has $102.76 Million Position in Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 2.1% during the fourth quarter, holding 313,938 shares valued at $102.76 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Amgen, with the company's stock currently trading at $353.93. Amgen recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Acquires 16,189 Shares of American International Group, Inc. $AIG
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in American International Group (AIG) by 2.7% during the fourth quarter, buying an additional 16,189 shares, bringing its total holding to 626,492 shares valued at approximately $53.6 million. AIG recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, representing an annualized yield of 2.4%. Analyst consensus on AIG shares is currently a "Hold" with an average target price of $88.17, despite several recent price target adjustments from various firms.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Purchases 35,291 Shares of American Electric Power Company, Inc. $AEP
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) by 4.1% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 35,291 shares. This brings their total holdings to 886,572 shares, valued at $102,231,000, making AEP their 19th largest holding. The article also details other institutional investor activity, American Electric Power's financial performance, dividend announcements, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: International Business Machines Corporation $IBM Shares Bought by Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. increased its stake in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) by 1.6% in the fourth quarter, adding 2,395 shares to hold a total of 148,210 shares valued at approximately $43.9 million. This comes after IBM reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $4.52 and revenue of $19.69 billion, marking a 12.2% year-over-year increase. Insider activity also showed recent buying, with directors acquiring 1,484 shares worth about $417,157 in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Sells 38,575 Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. $AJG
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. by 34.2%, selling 38,575 shares and ending the quarter with holdings worth $19.24 million. Despite this, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. recently beat EPS estimates, increased its quarterly dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts. The company shows strong financials with a market cap of $55 billion and a P/E ratio of 34.79.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley upgrades Equity Residential stock rating on market resilience
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) to Overweight from Equalweight, raising its price target to $74.00 from $72.00, citing the resilience of the company's markets and anticipated urban outperformance. The upgrade comes as the stock trades near its 52-week low, suggesting a good entry point. The firm highlighted Equity Residential's strong same-store net operating income and funds from operations per share growth relative to peers, and its opportunistic share buybacks in lieu of acquisitions.

feed.title: Innate Pharma Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Business Update
feed.summary: Innate Pharma has reported its full-year 2025 financial results and provided a business update. Key highlights include plans to initiate the lacutamab TELLOMAK-3 confirmatory Phase 3 trial in H2 2026, progress with IPH4502 showing preliminary anti-tumor activity, and the monalizumab PACIFIC-9 Phase 3 trial advancing towards a H2 2026 data readout. The company ended 2025 with a cash position of €44.8 million and anticipates a cash runway until the end of Q3 2026.

feed.title: Why IAC Stock Is Sinking Despite Its MGM Bet
feed.summary: IAC/InteractiveCorp. (IAC) stock is falling as investors express concern over the company's increased stake in MGM Resorts International, which has raised questions about its strategic focus. The sell-off is exacerbated by existing weaknesses in IAC's fundamentals, including a significant revenue decline and ongoing issues in its Search and Care.com businesses. Shareholders are increasingly doubting management's prioritization of long-term growth given these challenges.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley downgrades AvalonBay Communities stock rating on earnings outlook
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley downgraded AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) to Equalweight from Overweight, reducing its price target to $203 from $208. The downgrade stems from a revised earnings outlook, with projections for 2026 and 2027 showing roughly flat core funds from operations per share compared to 2025. Despite this, Morgan Stanley's 2028 estimate remains above consensus due to lower projected interest expenses, and AvalonBay maintains a strong dividend history.

feed.title: AIXTRON SE: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: AIXTRON SE has released a notification of major holdings according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG. BlackRock, Inc. reported an acquisition of shares with voting rights, pushing their total position in AIXTRON SE to 7.58%. This includes both direct voting rights attached to shares and indirect voting rights through instruments like lent securities and contracts for difference, with the threshold having been crossed on March 20, 2026.

feed.title: State Street Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Service Stream
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its asset management subsidiaries are no longer substantial shareholders in Service Stream Limited as of March 24, 2026. Their combined interest in Service Stream's voting securities fell below the substantial holder threshold, potentially reducing large institutional ownership in the company. Service Stream Limited (AU:SSM) is an Australian company providing outsourced services primarily for utilities and telecommunications providers.

feed.title: Business booming for Ross Dress for Less as many shoppers, retailers struggle
feed.summary: As many traditional retailers and shoppers face economic struggles and inflation, bargain chains like Ross Dress for Less are thriving. Ross Stores Inc. plans to open 110 new outlets this year, attracting customers through discounted products and capitalizing on a shift away from mainstream retailers. Other discount stores like T.J. Maxx, Dollar General, and Five Below are also expanding, demonstrating a market trend where consumers are increasingly seeking value and affordability.

feed.title: Central Valley Advisors LLC Purchases 14,587 Shares of Netflix, Inc. $NFLX
feed.summary: Central Valley Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) by 1,015.8% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 14,587 shares to hold a total of 16,023 shares valued at approximately $1.50 million. This comes as Netflix reported strong Q4 results, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates, with advertising revenue surging 2.5x and a BTS livestream attracting 18.4 million viewers. Despite substantial insider selling, institutional investors own a significant portion of the stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for NFLX.

feed.title: First Merchants Corp Has $9.91 Million Position in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: First Merchants Corp increased its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 14.1% in Q4, bringing its total holdings to 69,180 shares valued at approximately $9.91 million. Despite insider sales totaling over $55 million in the last quarter, institutions hold 65.77% of the company's stock. Procter & Gamble maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $168.33, an annualized dividend of $4.23 (2.9% yield), and a market capitalization of $334.2 billion.

feed.title: First Merchants Corp Has $7.02 Million Position in ServiceNow, Inc. $NOW
feed.summary: First Merchants Corp significantly increased its stake in ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) by 413.2% in Q4, now holding 45,824 shares valued at $7.02 million. ServiceNow exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and reported strong revenue growth of 20.7% year-over-year, reaching $3.57 billion. Despite recent insider selling and some market turbulence related to AI concerns, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $192.61, noting continued subscription revenue growth and increasing AI adoption.

feed.title: First Merchants Corp Increases Stock Position in Ball Corporation $BALL
feed.summary: First Merchants Corp significantly increased its stake in Ball Corporation by 125.9% in Q4, now holding 75,609 shares valued at approximately $4.01 million. Ball Corporation surpassed Q4 earnings expectations with $0.91 EPS and $3.35 billion in revenue, and analysts predict approximately $3.48 EPS for the current fiscal year. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $68.77 and offers a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, representing a 1.3% yield.

feed.title: Corundum Group Inc. Invests $12.46 Million in Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Corundum Group Inc. has acquired a new position of 25,760 shares, valued at $12.46 million, in Lockheed Martin Corporation, making it their fifth-largest holding. Lockheed Martin recently reported Q4 EPS of $5.80 on revenue of $20.32 billion and declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45. While several analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $623.16, the company faces both positive catalysts like increased production demands and headwinds such as rare-earth supply risks and regulatory scrutiny.
